explanation: The user wants to put an object (potato_2) into the same cabinet as the others, specifically cabinet_4, which is already open and contains other items like fork, knife, and potatoes. The old plan successfully found potato_2 on the countertop. Since the robot is not currently holding anything, it must first pick up potato_2. After picking it up, it should place it into cabinet_4, which is the same cabinet as the others mentioned in the state. This action aligns with the instruction to 'put it in the same cabinet'.
